definitions.text: ISO 639-3 language code for Teutila Cuicatec.
To incise, to cut into the surface of something. To perform an incision on, for example with a knife. To divide with a knife, scissors, or another sharp instrument.
examples: Would you please cut the cake?
I have three diamonds to cut today.

definitions.text: To perform an incision on, for example with a knife.
To divide with a knife, scissors, or another sharp instrument.
examples: Would you please cut the cake?
The pitcher threw a cut fastball that was slower than his usual pitch.
Cut brandy is a liquor made of brandy and hard grain liquor.

definitions.text: Carved into a shape; not raw.

examples: He made a fine cut with his sword.

definitions.text: An attack made with a chopping motion of the blade, landing with its edge or point.
